extract: Icicle Spear (Japanese: つららばり Icicle Needle) is a damage-dealing Ice-type multistrike move introduced in Generation III. Prior to Generation V, it was the signature move of Shellder, but other Pokémon could still inherit it via breeding. It is: TM51 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM187 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM149 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
